title: Soft without feeling heavy
text: This made my hair feel soft without turning it greasy. The smell is fresh but not too strong for my morning routine.

title: Leaked in the box
text: The product itself might be fine but the bottle leaked all over the box. I would not order again until the packaging is fixed.

title: Gentle daily product
text: I have sensitive skin and this felt gentle for daily use. I still patch tested first, but so far no irritation.

title: Too strong for me
text: The scent was way too strong and lingered on my clothes. If you get headaches from fragrance this is not subtle.

title: Works after shower
text: Works best right after a shower. My skin stayed moisturized through the afternoon and did not feel sticky.

title: Good but expensive
text: I like the texture and it works, but it feels expensive for the size. I would wait for a sale.

title: Sticky finish
text: The finish was sticky on my arms for almost an hour. It smelled nice but I could not get past the texture.

title: Nice scent
text: The smell is clean and botanical, not candy sweet. I wish the pump gave a little more control.

title: Rash after using
text: I got a rash after using it twice. Maybe it works for others, but I would be careful if your skin reacts easily.

title: Moisture without shine
text: My hair looks smoother and soft, but not shiny in a fake way. It works better than the heavier cream I used before.
